description: OIDC device-code auth for user identity + IRC SASL; stores auth.json at ~/.zchat/. ergo_auth_script.py is a standalone subprocess spoken over stdin/stdout JSON by ergo's auth-script feature

key_classes_functions.name: get_username
key_classes_functions.purpose: Read username from auth.json (bypasses expiry — identity != credential)

key_classes_functions.name: save_token
key_classes_functions.purpose: Write auth.json with 0600 perms via O_CREAT|O_TRUNC

key_classes_functions.name: load_cached_token
key_classes_functions.purpose: Return None if missing, malformed, or past expires_at

key_classes_functions.name: _print_qr
key_classes_functions.purpose: Render QR to terminal via segno (optional dep)

key_classes_functions.name: _sanitize_irc_nick
key_classes_functions.purpose: RFC 2812-compatible nick — strip disallowed chars, strip leading digits/-, fallback 'user'

key_classes_functions.name: _extract_username
key_classes_functions.purpose: Priority chain: username > preferred_username > email local part > sub

key_classes_functions.name: device_code_flow
key_classes_functions.purpose: Full OIDC device flow: discovery → device_authorization → polling → userinfo; return dict with tokens + endpoints for later refresh

key_classes_functions.name: refresh_token_if_needed
key_classes_functions.purpose: POST grant_type=refresh_token; update auth.json in place

key_classes_functions.name: get_credentials
key_classes_functions.purpose: Return (username, access_token) — auto-refresh when token expired

key_classes_functions.name: validate_credentials (ergo_auth_script)
key_classes_functions.purpose: GET userinfo_url with passphrase as Bearer token; enforce accountName owner matches userinfo preferred_username

key_classes_functions.name: main (ergo_auth_script)
key_classes_functions.purpose: stdin JSON request → validate → stdout JSON response

key_classes_functions.name: AGENT_SEPARATOR / _IRC_NICK_RE (ergo_auth_script)
key_classes_functions.purpose: Inlined constants to avoid zchat_protocol import in ergo subprocess

public_interface: get_username, save_token, load_cached_token, device_code_flow, refresh_token_if_needed, get_credentials, discover_oidc_endpoints, _global_auth_dir, _sanitize_irc_nick, _extract_username
